heading: Wivenhoe Pocket vs Woleebee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wivenhoe Pocket, Queensland and Woleebee, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wivenhoe Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Woleebee (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wivenhoe Pocket or Woleebee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wivenhoe Pocket has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Woleebee scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wivenhoe Pocket scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Woleebee scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wivenhoe Pocket or Woleebee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wivenhoe Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
